text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
There are many "triple crowns" in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Among them is the Classic Triple Crown, a tour
open to runners only once in their lifetime. Why
do so many decide to take on the challenge?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, firstly, popular opinion states that the
Triple Crown champion is the face of her
generation.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown is a fleeting opportunity
to show one's prowess. Effort is not the only
factor here—luck is important as well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Speed, luck, and strength. It is a perilous path,
but that peril is itself the answer you seek.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's the reason why both runners and fans alike
cannot resist the glimmer of that crown.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thus, the Triple Crown champion assumes a
position unparalleled, becoming a pillar of hope
and trust.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
So you could say that challengers are vying for
that position.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's considering just one element of the
complexity that comprises the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And take it only as my opinion. Were you to ask
another Umamusume, and in particular—

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Aren't you overthinking things?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Here's a question for you, Miss Reporter. Why do
you think that bird is flying in the sky?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Well, it's circling around so... maybe it's
hunting for food?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there you go overthinking things again.
The answer is much simpler than that.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: It flies because birds can fly. No?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I run because I am an Umamusume. I follow where
my heart leads me, to where the breeze blows.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
And if I find a path that looks fun, I enjoy all it
has to offer. No matter what awaits me there.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Although, I know someone who sees it the other
way around.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...The strongest competitors take on the Triple
Crown tour. What other choice is there but to
challenge them?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
So you're not worried about the caliber of these
strong competitors?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No. That's the point. Plus, everyone knows they
only get one shot, so they put everything on the
line.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Only after clashing with the best can you be
called the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That brings me back to a point Symboli
Rudolf made about the "position" of the Triple
Crown champion. So, you would agree that
earning the title places you at a point unparall—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No. It's only the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Becoming the strongest only earns you entry into
the hunting grounds where those with even more
strength gather.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And if you want to challenge them, you've got to
prove that you're a real threat. Otherwise, what's
the point?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Once you stand alongside those who've earned
the same title... that's when fangs are bared for
real.

text_block_list.name: Twinkle Monthly
text_block_list.text:
"Though it may mean different things to different
runners, the Triple Crown has an unquestionable
and irresistible allure."

text_block_list.name: Twinkle Monthly
text_block_list.text:
"That is why Umamusume choose this path, from
the champions of the past to the winners of the
future. —Etsuko Otonashi"
